name: Villain!Kate Bishop
description:
Trained assassin and World's greatest Archer

Katherine Elizabeth "Kate" Bishop is the daughter of Eleanor Bishop. Having lost her father during an accident at a charity event, thanks to Clint Barton's actions. This lead her to learning archery, martial arts, and fencing to get her revenge on Clint Barton and for her to work for the notorious Giulietta Nefaria also known as Madame Masque.
creator: itspbandjellytime
